column1: # This file maps stable ABI discriminant values to UnitId variant names.
# It is the ONLY place where FFI discriminant values are assigned.
# Unit trait implementations at compile time — this file does NOT duplicate
# Discriminant encoding: DSSCC where D=dimension (1 digit)
# Units are grouped by dimension with ranges:
# ABI CONTRACT: Existing discriminant values MUST NEVER change.
# New units may be appended with new discriminant values.
